economic_notes: Nation has equity investments in White River Development Corporation (WRDC, 100% owned) and White River First Nation Limited Partnership (WRFNLP, 99% owned), both accounted for using modified equity method. Nation receives significant funding from ISC, HC, and Yukon Government.
notes: Financial statements are presented upside down (mirrored) in the scanned document. The nation has two GBEs: White River Development Corporation (WRDC, 100%) and White River First Nation Limited Partnership (WRFNLP, 99%), both using modified equity method. Revenue lines extracted from the Consolidated Statement of Operations but some amounts may be approximate due to document orientation. Prior year figures from comparative columns. OSR could not be clearly separated from government transfers as most revenue appears to be government-sourced. Audit was dated July 16, 2021, over a year after fiscal year end. The 2019 comparative statements were audited by a different auditor.
